sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31848" key="e)/kdetos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔκδετος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἐκδέω</etym>) <sense id="n31848.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fastened to,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐξ ἵππων</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.97</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alph.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
